name: custom-design-system
description: Token-first design system: CSS variables, Tailwind preset, SCSS bridge. Seeded from vue-playground.

scripts.release: git push && npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: git push && npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: git push && npm version major -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
